summary.lv: Microsoft Dynamics 365 CRM izstrādātāja amats Q.BEYOND, veidojot biznesa lietojumprogrammas un automatizācijas ar Microsoft Power Platform, Dynamics 365 Sales Hub, Power Automate un Dataverse, izmantojot C# spraudņus un Azure DevOps.
summary.en: A Microsoft Dynamics 365 CRM Developer role at Q.BEYOND building business applications and automations with the Microsoft Power Platform, Dynamics 365 Sales Hub, Power Automate and Dataverse, using C# plugins and Azure DevOps.
